title: Sunrun

title: Tesla Solar
description: Tesla Solar offers sleek, low-profile solar panels and the powerful Powerwall battery for whole-home backup at competitive prices.
features: Low-profile solar panels, Powerwall home battery, Solar Roof option, Tesla app monitoring, 25-year panel warranty, Price match guarantee

description: Trinity Solar is a family-owned solar installer serving the East Coast with customized solar solutions and strong customer service.

title: Momentum Solar
description: Momentum Solar handles every step of the solar process in-house — from design to installation — ensuring quality and accountability.
features: In-house design & installation, Solar panel systems, Battery storage, $0-down financing, Online account management, Performance guarantee
